deliverable: Clean academic framework diagram in 16:9 landscape
subject: A six-stage multimodal machine-learning architecture
composition: Six aligned columns connected left to right, dashed rounded module groups, consistent arrows, clear hierarchy, generous spacing
style: Peer-reviewed paper figure, white background, thin vector lines, low-saturation fills, mathematically restrained
palette: Muted blue, sage, sand, lavender, and charcoal

text.placement: One short heading centered above each of the six columns
text.hierarchy: Consistent semibold module headings; no paragraph text

constraints: All arrows must have a clear direction
